title: Premature Baby Home Care: The Essential Nursery Checklist
summary: A comprehensive guide on maintaining standard room temperature, nursery hygiene, diaper monitoring, and basic infant comfort at home.

title: Understanding the NICU: Medical Terms & Equipment Guide
summary: A quick glossary explaining standard neonatal equipment like incubators, phototherapy lights, and cardiorespiratory monitors in parent-friendly terms.

title: Daily Feeding & Hydration Log Sheet
summary: A printable tracking sheet to record daily feeding times, expressed breast milk volumes, and wet/dirty diaper counts to share with your pediatrician.

title: Preterm Developmental Milestones & Corrected Age Chart
summary: Step-by-step instructions on calculating corrected gestational age, with a timeline of developmental milestones adjusted for premature infants.

title: Kangaroo Mother Care: Step-by-Step Position Guide
summary: Illustrated safety instructions on how to secure your preterm infant upright against your chest for safe and comfortable skin-to-skin contact.

title: Ready for Discharge: Hospital to Home Transition Guide
summary: A preparation checklist covering car seat guidelines, pediatric appointment schedules, emergency warning signs, and nursery organization.

title: Questions to Ask Your Pediatrician & Neonatal Care Team
summary: Categorized questions regarding feeding, breathing, growth tracker data, and development markers to help prepare for clinical follow-ups.

title: Emotional Resilience & Caregiver Support Manual
summary: A guide for parents on managing stress, communicating with family members, sharing caregiving duties, and preventing emotional burnout.
